column12: Added $...$ inline math delimiter to KaTeX auto-render config in base.html and _interactive_scripts.html (3 locations). Inline LaTeX formulas using $...$ syntax were not being rendered because only $$...$$ and \(...\) delimiters were configured. Systematic fix across all pages.

column12: All equations were already in LaTeX ($...$ and $$...$$). The rendering issue was caused by KaTeX not recognizing $...$ delimiters — resolved by systematic KaTeX config fix in feedback #6 (2026-03-28).
